// projectId: GCP project ID. Also via GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT env var.
// region: Vertex AI region. 'global' required for preview models. Also via GOOGLE_CLOUD_LOCATION.
// thinking: Controls how Claude reasons before responding. Pi's thinking level (minimal/low/
medium/high/xhigh) is selected by the user in Pi's UI. This config determines
how that level translates to Anthropic's API.
'adaptive'  — recommended for 4.6 models (default). Claude decides how deeply
to think based on task complexity. Pi levels map to effort hints:
A typo fix gets ~100 thinking tokens, a system design gets ~50k.
{ ... }     — DEPRECATED for 4.6 models. Explicit budget_tokens per Pi level.
Gives hard cost ceiling but may truncate reasoning mid-thought
or waste tokens over-thinking simple tasks.
All 5 levels required. Values are token counts.
Careful: values exceeding model.maxTokens will be capped.
Thinking can also be disabled per-session in Pi's UI (thinking level → 'off').
// temperature: Optional (0.0–1.0). Only applied when thinking is off in Pi's UI.
Anthropic rejects temperature when thinking is enabled.
Lower = more deterministic, higher = more creative/diverse.
null or omit to use Anthropic's default (1.0).
// cache: Prompt caching. Omit or set false to disable.

cache.// system: System prompt — rarely changes, 1h TTL recommended.
cache.// tools: Tool definitions — rarely change, 1h TTL recommended.
cache.// messages: Conversation history — prefix is stable, 5m TTL for interactive use.
